summary: Treatment duration significantly influences patient experience and quality of life due to reduced exposure time, while maintaining equivalent tumor control rates when using advanced fractionation schemes such as hypofractionation. Evidence demonstrates that shortening treatment duration—notably through high-dose-per-fraction approaches—is associated with non-inferior or potentially superior outcomes regarding both disease control and adverse effect profiles.

Evidence demonstrates that shortening treatment duration—notably through high-dose-per-fraction approaches—is associated with non-inferior or potentially superior outcomes regarding both disease control and adverse effect profiles.. Answer choice: A
